message:
feat(task8): parse depends_on in tool handler and enrich update response

Update handler now parses depends_on from both append and update tool
calls, wiring them through to the task store. When an update marks a task
done or cancelled, the response includes progress and lists the next
eligible tasks to guide the model's workflow, or reports all complete /
no tasks ready as appropriate.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
